## About Sasashi

Sasashi is a village in Lentekhi municipality, Municipality in Racha-Lechkhumi and Lower Svaneti, Georgia.

## Location

Sasashi is situated in **Lentekhi municipality**, Municipality in Racha-Lechkhumi and Lower Svaneti region of Georgia.
